from pydantic import BaseModel


class UserSchema(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    email: str


def parse_user_payload(raw_json: str) -> UserSchema:
    return UserSchema.model_validate_json(raw_json)


def load_config(config_str: str) -> UserSchema:
    return UserSchema.model_validate_json(config_str)


def process_message(message_bytes: bytes) -> UserSchema:
    return UserSchema.model_validate_json(message_bytes)
